expected_behavior: Presents preset selection (Complete, Standard, Lite, Hooks-only, Monorepo)
Walks through skill category customization allowing users to enable or disable groups
Offers agent selection (Product and Technical agents)

Offers MCP server configuration options for external tool integrations

Skips full preset selection since preset was provided as argument
Still offers customization of hooks and MCP settings

Answers the question using web search or general knowledge
Configure is only for OrchestKit plugin settings, not general queries
